constraints: React inline styles only (React.CSSProperties), NO Tailwind

theme_and_archetype.core_philosophy: Professional glassmorphism. Deep space background with subtle neon ambient glows. Single-layer glass cards. No nested containers. Flat interactive rows.

typography.fontFamily: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

depth_hierarchy.z0_background: Solid #08080A with radial gradients (fixed position, Cyan top-right, Indigo bottom-left, heavily blurred).
depth_hierarchy.z10_base_content: Flat lists (Findings rows), text elements resting directly on the glowing background.
depth_hierarchy.z20_glass_surfaces: Risk meter card, Modals, Sticky Header bar. Uses backdrop-filter: blur(20px) and inner 1px border.
depth_hierarchy.z30_floating_elements: Dropdowns, Tooltips, Chatbot bubble, Primary action buttons.

header.style: Glass surface (rgba(255,255,255,0.02), backdropFilter: blur(12px)), sticky top, borderBottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08).
header.elements: Logo (brandAccent color), Subtitle ('Terms & risk', textSecondary, 12px), Logout icon (hover: textPrimary).

risk_meter_card.style: Glass surface token. borderRadius: 16px. boxShadow: ambient. No internal nested cards.
risk_meter_card.pointer: Absolute positioned triangle or vertical pill (bg: #FAFAFA, shadow-drop), smooth transition on left%.
risk_meter_card.score_display: Large numeric (textPrimary, 36px, letterSpacing tight) + Label (14px, colored by risk level base).

risk_breakdown_stats.items: 3 columns. Number (18px, textPrimary) + Label (12px, textSecondary). Left border: 2px solid risk color base. PaddingLeft: 6px.

finding_row.layout: Flex row, gap 12px, padding 12px 16px, alignItems flex-start. DO NOT nest inside another card.
finding_row.style: Transparent background, hover: rgba(255,255,255,0.03). borderBottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04).
finding_row.accent_border: Left border 3px solid risk color base (absolute or flex item left edge).
finding_row.chip: Uppercase, fontSize 10px, letterSpacing 0.1em, background: risk bg (10% opac), color: risk light. borderRadius 4px, padding 2px 6px.

primary.hover: transform: scale(0.98), opacity: 0.9. transition: all 0.2s ease.

secondary.style: background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05), border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1), color: #FAFAFA. borderRadius: 8px.

inputs_and_upload.input: background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2), border: 1px solid borderGlass. focus: border brandAccent, boxShadow 0 0 0 2px brandAccentGlow. padding 12px, borderRadius 8px.
inputs_and_upload.drag_drop: border: 1px dashed borderGlassStrong. background: rgba(255,255,255,0.01). hover: border brandAccent. Flex center, column, gap 8px.

loader.style: 3-ring orbital. 3 absolute div rings with borderTop/borderLeft brandAccent. Different animation durations (1s, 1.5s, 2s) linear infinite.

chat_assistant.trigger: Floating button bottom-right. Glass surface, circular, 48x48. Icon inside. boxShadow: ambient.
chat_assistant.bubble: Glass card, maxWidth 85%. User message: rgba(255,255,255,0.1) flat. Anee message: transparent, textPrimary.

css_in_js_animations.spin: keyframes { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
css_in_js_animations.slideUpFade: keyframes { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

interactions.finding_stagger: Apply animation: slideUpFade 0.3s ease-out forwards. Use style={{ animationDelay: 'calc(var(--index) * 0.05s)' }} for stagger effect.

rules: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attribute.
